title: Litigation for In-House Counsels
subtitle: Strategy, Management & Courtroom Readiness — Foundation
summary: Equip junior to mid-level in-house counsel with the practical mechanics of litigation — court processes, drafting pleadings, interim applications, evidence handling, and tribunal exposure across NCLT and DRT.
usp: Manage disputes proactively, brief counsel intelligently, and read a case file like a litigator.
modules: The litigation lifecycle and pre-litigation strategy
Tribunal exposure: NCLT, DRT, consumer forums
Identifying legal and commercial risks early in disputes
Engaging external counsel and managing law-firm relationships

title: Litigation for In-House Counsels
subtitle: Strategy, Management & Courtroom Readiness — Advanced
summary: Built for senior in-house counsel and legal managers handling complex disputes, multi-forum litigation, and arbitration. Aligns litigation strategy with business objectives and board-level reporting.
usp: Lead high-stakes disputes with strategic clarity. Translate procedural reality into board-ready judgement.
modules: Coordination with senior counsel and law firms

title: Litigation, Business to Business
subtitle: Customised Corporate Program
summary: Strengthens in-house teams' capability to manage disputes internally and reduce dependence on external counsel. Tailored to your sector, risk profile, and operational realities.
usp: A bespoke litigation operating system for your legal function — built around your actual disputes.
modules: Litigation risk assessment for your sector

title: Fundamentals of Contract Drafting
subtitle: Foundation Program for Practising Advocates
summary: Builds foundational contract drafting and advisory skill for advocates — emphasising clarity, enforceability, and real-world applicability under Indian law.
usp: Draft contracts that are enforceable, precise, and dispute-ready.
modules: Common drafting pitfalls and how to avoid them

title: Contracts in Action
subtitle: Practical Bootcamp · Advanced
summary: An advanced advisory and commercial drafting program integrating strategic thinking with litigation outcomes. Built for advocates advising corporate clients.
usp: Drafting and advisory expertise that integrates commercial insight with litigation-informed strategy.
modules: Learning from real disputes and arbitration outcomes

title: Contract Drafting for Universities
subtitle: Institutional Program · Law Students
summary: Bulk training tailored for law schools. Students learn practical drafting, dispute-relevance, and applied exercises customised to academic stage and institutional requirements.
usp: Equip students with practice-ready contract drafting skills they can use the day they qualify.
modules: Exposure to tribunal and arbitration processes
Adaptable for semester courses, workshops, or bootcamps

title: Litigation Training for Universities
subtitle: Institutional Program · Law Students
summary: Litigation-focused training that bridges academic learning and real-world practice — court procedures, pleadings, hearings, evidence handling, and dispute strategy.
usp: Prepare students for practice-ready careers in litigation, with mock exercises and tribunal exposure.
modules: Court procedures and the litigation lifecycle
Mock litigation exercises and tribunal exposure
Pathways to litigation and corporate advisory careers
